# thoth_billing_estimate (Data Source)

Builds a dry-run monthly invoice estimate using Aten-managed pricing and credit-bank burn-down.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "thoth_billing_estimate" "this_month" {
  period                     = "2026-05"
  compliance_uplift_percent  = 10
  fixed_discount_percent     = 0
  average_monthly_burn_cents = 300000
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `period` (String) Billing period in YYYY-MM format. Defaults to current UTC month.
- `as_of` (String) RFC3339 timestamp for estimate cutoff.
- `compliance_uplift_percent` (Number) Optional compliance surcharge percent applied before discounts.
- `fixed_discount_percent` (Number) Optional fixed discount percent applied before credit-bank burn-down.
- `average_monthly_burn_cents` (Number) Optional baseline used for low-balance alert threshold.
- `active_identities_override` (Number) Optional usage override for active governed identities.
- `policy_checks_override` (Number) Optional usage override for policy checks.

### Read-Only

- `compliance_receipt` (String) Compliance receipt text included in downstream invoices.
- `credit_burns_json` (String) FIFO wallet burn-down events as JSON.
- `gross_bill_cents` (Number) Gross bill before fixed discounts and credit-bank application.
- `line_item_compliance_uplift_cents` (Number) Compliance uplift line item in cents.
- `line_item_credits_applied_cents` (Number) Credits consumed from active wallets in cents.
- `line_item_enforcement_overage_cents` (Number) Enforcement overage line item in cents.
- `line_item_fixed_discount_cents` (Number) Fixed discount line item in cents.
- `line_item_identity_overage_cents` (Number) Identity overage line item in cents.
- `line_item_platform_fee_cents` (Number) Platform fee line item in cents.
- `line_item_storage_capacity_cents` (Number) Storage capacity surcharge line item in cents.
- `line_item_storage_retention_cents` (Number) Storage retention surcharge line item in cents.
- `low_balance_alert` (Boolean) True when active credit balance is below alert threshold.
- `net_total_cents` (Number) Net bill after discounts and FIFO prepaid-credit burn-down.
- `period_effective` (String) Effective billing period used by GovAPI.
- `pricing_tier` (String) Effective pricing tier used for estimate calculation.
- `response_json` (String) Full estimate payload as JSON.
- `summary_json` (String) Nested invoice summary object as JSON.
- `worm_retention_days` (Number) Effective WORM retention days represented in billing output.
